title: senecio imoleus
intro: Senecio imoleus, also known as Devil's bush, is a plant species native to South Africa, characterized by its distinctive leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a purgative and anthelmintic, helping to remove parasites from the body. The health benefits of Senecio imoleus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. In herbal preparations, Senecio imoleus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
